choices.text: 600+ GB for full chain; prune=5500 for last 5.5 GB only (limits Lightning). SSD recommended for IBD speed.

questions.explanation: 600+ GB full or prune for minimal disk.

questions.prompt: Look up any tx by id?

choices.text: Requires txindex=1 in bitcoin.conf. Adds ~10 GB index. Without it, only wallet txs queryable.

questions.explanation: txindex=1 needed for non-wallet tx lookups.

choices.text: Bitcoin Core doesn't index addresses. Add electrs / esplora / Fulcrum indexer. Powers Electrum wallet, mempool.space backend, custom apps.
Offline hardware wallet generates xpub → import to online watch-only wallet → tx via PSBT (create online, sign offline, broadcast online). Funds never touch online machine.
ZeroMQ pub/sub: zmqpubrawtx, zmqpubrawblock, zmqpubhashtx, zmqpubhashblock in bitcoin.conf. Subscribe via ZMQ socket. Used by Lightning, mempool.space, payment processors.
